mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_payment_advertisement (ad_id, member_id, amount, payment_method, receipt_id, paid_at) VALUES (#{adId}, #{memberId}, #{amount}, #{paymentMethod}, #{receiptId}, #{paidAt}::timestamp)
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_payment_advertisement SET payment_status = #{paymentStatus}, paid_at = #{paidAt}::timestamp WHERE receipt_id = #{receiptId}
